source_pr.title: executor: fix DATA RACE in the TestAnalyzeParameters and other 3 test cases
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: executor: fix DATA RACE in the TestAnalyzeParameters and other 3 test cases
failure_signature: executor: fix DATA RACE in the TestAnalyzeParameters and other 3 test cases
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a data race in test setup/bootstrapping: the tests created a mock store and then separately bootstrapped a domain/session, which can introduce unsafe concurrent state in the test lifecycle. This PR stabilizes the affected analyze tests by using `testkit.CreateMockStoreAndDomain` (store+domain+cleanup via one helper) instead of mixing `CreateMockStore` with extra `BootstrapSession` calls.
fix_pattern: Use testkit helpers for store+domain/session setup to avoid bootstrapping data races in tests.

evidence: evidence: executor: fix DATA RACE in the TestAnalyzeParameters and other 3 test cases
